s: Know what to study next — a decision-free study tracker
d:
StudyDesk is a study execution app for students.

Features:
* Enter your courses and deadlines; the Next Up engine ranks what to do right now
* Organise courses by school year and period (jakso)
* Read-only Period History with per-period GPA
* Grade on IB and GPA scales
* Built-in Pomodoro focus timer
* Optional AI study debrief after a session

Warm paper aesthetic. Local-first; optional account-gated cloud sync. No Google Play Services — Google sign-in is a plain web OAuth flow.

Part of the Limecore Nexus suite. Available in English, Finnish, French, German, Spanish and Chinese.
